title: T-002 — scheduler_assignments table + RLS + indexes
prompt:
# T-002 — scheduler_assignments table + RLS + indexes

PRD: 07-PLANNING-EXT-PRD.md §9.3, §15.4 V-SCHED-04
Project root: /Users/mariuszkrawczyk/Projects/monopilot-kira

## Goal
Introduce `scheduler_assignments` table holding draft/approved/rejected/overridden WO assignments produced by solver, with tenant RLS, four indexes, and FK chain to scheduler_runs(run_id) ON DELETE CASCADE.

## Implementation contract
1. Migration `packages/db/migrations/0071_scheduler_assignments.sql`: CREATE TYPE assignment_status ENUM (draft|approved|rejected|overridden), CREATE TABLE scheduler_assignments per §9.3 DDL.
2. RLS policy on tenant_id; four indexes: idx_scheduler_assignments_run, _wo, _status, _time.
3. Drizzle schema in `packages/db/src/schema/scheduler_assignments.ts`.
4. RED test asserts RLS, FK cascade, optimizer_score numeric precision (10,2).

## Files
- packages/db/migrations/0071_scheduler_assignments.sql [create]
- packages/db/src/schema/scheduler_assignments.ts [create]
- packages/db/src/schema/index.ts [modify]
- packages/db/__tests__/scheduler-assignments.test.ts [create]

## Acceptance criteria
1. Given migration 0071 applied, when \d scheduler_assignments runs, then all §9.3 columns present, RLS enabled, four specified indexes exist
2. Given a scheduler_runs row deleted, when ON DELETE CASCADE fires, then all child scheduler_assignments rows are removed
3. Given two tenants, when each SELECTs, then each sees only its own assignments

## Test strategy
- RED: write packages/db/__tests__/scheduler-assignments.test.ts asserting cascade + RLS + numeric(10,2) precision
- Run 'pnpm --filter db migrate && pnpm --filter db test scheduler-assignments'

## Risk red lines
- Do not omit ON DELETE CASCADE on run_id FK
- Do not skip RLS policy
- Do not relax assignment_status enum to TEXT

pipeline_inputs.description: Create scheduler_assignments table with RLS, status enum, FK cascade to scheduler_runs, four indexes, and override audit columns.

Drizzle schema mirrors columns with NUMERIC(10,2) precision for optimizer_score. RED test verifies cascade delete and tenant isolation.
